articles.description: Veteran pass rusher Khalil Mack had planned to explore all options in free agency.
articles.content:
Veteran pass rusher Khalil Mack had planned to explore all options in free agency. Two days before free agency opened, Mack decided to stay where he has been for the last four years.
Via Adam Scheft… [+783 chars]

articles.title: IndyCar puts on a Phoenix race to celebrate after eight years away - RACER - Racing News
articles.description: The overwhelming memory of IndyCar's return to Phoenix will be of an instant classic produced by drivers old and new.
articles.content: Having been here for IndyCars last stint at Phoenix Raceway from 2016-2018, it looked like there were more fans in the grandstands at todays Good Ranchers 250 the opener for the first NASCAR/IndyCar … [+3138 chars]
